title: Agent decision envelope (v1, pinned)
description: Outer envelope the agent emits. The 'decision' object is validated separately against the persona payload schema (v1: triage.decision.schema.json). additionalProperties:false applies OUTSIDE the decision object only.

reasoning.description: Short summary of how the decision was reached. Required when status=ok.

decision.description: Persona-specific payload. Shape is open here; validated against the triage payload schema by the apply step.
